features: GENTLE FORMULA: Baby oil gel enriched with soothing lavender and chamomile extracts, perfect for delicate baby skin
MASSAGE OIL: Ideal consistency for baby massage, helping create a calming bedtime routine and promoting parent-child bonding
MOISTURISING BENEFITS: Prevents dryness and keeps baby's skin soft, smooth and properly hydrated throughout the day
CONVENIENT GEL: Non-drip gel formula makes application easy and mess-free compared to traditional liquid oils
GENEROUS SIZE: 200ml bottle provides ample supply for regular use in baby's skincare routine
description: Product Description Gentle baby products formulated with love At My Little Miracle, we believe that every baby is a precious gift, a tiny miracle to be cherished. Our journey began with a simple yet profound desire: to create skincare products that are as gentle and pure as a newborn's skin. We understand that a baby's skin is delicate and requires the utmost care, which is why we've crafted a range of products designed to nourish and protect. From the moment we conceived My Little Miracle, we were driven by a passion for quality and a commitment to creating products that are effective. Our formulations are free from harsh chemicals and irritants, ensuring a safe and soothing experience for your little one. Our products are more than just skincare; they are a symbol of love, nurturing, and the precious bond between parent and child. Bubbly Baby Oil Gel • Gentle formula for daily care. • Moisturises and protects from dryness. • Ideal for baby massage. • Free from parabens, dyes and phthalates. Top to Toe Baby Wash • Gentle formula for daily care. • Gently cleanses hair & scalp. • Suitable from birth. • Free from parabens, dyes and phthalates. Wriggly Baby Oil • Gentle formula for daily care. • Moisturises & protects delicate skin. • Ideal for baby massage. Snappy Baby Shampoo • Gentle formula for daily care. • Suitable for newborns and upwards. • Suitable for sensitive skin. • Free from parabens, dyes and phthalates. Flaming Baby Lotion • Gentle formula for daily care. • Keeps skin feeling soft and healthy. • Nourishes baby’s skin. • Free from parabens, dyes and phthalates. Splashy Baby Bath • Gentle formula for daily care. • Keeps skin feeling soft and healthy. • Nourishes baby’s skin. • Free from parabens, dyes and phthalates. • Hypoallergenic.
